# Bryan Jay Maningas Portfolio

Bryan Jay Maningas is the founder of BMM Digital PH. He helps businesses connect Meta Ads, conversion-focused websites, automation, and AI chatbot follow-up into one growth system.

## Site Links

- [Homepage](https://bry.bmmdigital.ph/)

- [Capabilities](https://bry.bmmdigital.ph/#capabilities)
- [Journey](https://bry.bmmdigital.ph/#journey)
- [Contact](https://bry.bmmdigital.ph/#contact)
